prompt: Create a Kafka connection called prod-kafka in workspace dev-streams (project 65094f059e0776665611598b) for my Confluent Cloud cluster.

assertions.name: does_not_ask_for_password
assertions.description: Does NOT ask the user for their Kafka password or SASL credentials
assertions.reason: The MCP tool's elicitation mechanism collects sensitive fields. Asking upfront defeats the purpose and creates security risk.

assertions.name: does_not_ask_for_bootstrap_servers
assertions.description: Does NOT ask the user for bootstrap server addresses before calling the tool
assertions.reason: Bootstrap servers are collected by tool elicitation, not the LLM

assertions.name: calls_build_tool
assertions.description: Calls or proposes atlas-streams-build with resource='connection', connectionType='Kafka'

assertions.name: trusts_elicitation
assertions.description: Mentions that the tool will collect missing fields, or proceeds without gathering sensitive config first

expected_tool_call.note: Tool elicitation handles bootstrapServers, authentication, and password — do NOT include these in the call

common_mistakes.mistake: Asking 'What are your bootstrap servers?' before calling the tool
common_mistakes.error: Creates unnecessary friction and exposes sensitive infrastructure details in chat
common_mistakes.fix: Call atlas-streams-build directly. The tool will prompt for missing required fields via elicitation.

common_mistakes.mistake: Including placeholder values for bootstrap servers in the tool call
common_mistakes.error: Tool call fails with validation error for placeholder values
common_mistakes.fix: Omit fields that will be elicited. The tool handles collection of bootstrapServers, username, password.

skill_reference: SKILL.md: 'Do NOT ask the user for: passwords/secrets, bootstrap servers, connection strings. Let MCP tool elicitation collect these.'
